items.title: Jamie Murray, Andy's brother, retires from tennis
items.summary: Jamie Murray, who became the first British doubles player to reach the top of the world rankings, has joined his brother Andy in retirement.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Source: Ekitike ruptures Achilles, misses WC
items.summary: Hugo Ekitike will miss the World Cup and be out for at least nine months after he ruptured his Achilles tendon on Tuesday night, a source told ESPN.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Tigers sign top prospect Kevin McGonigle to eight-year, $150 million extension
items.summary: McGonigle is the latest top prospect to sign a long-term deal this spring
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
